name: Tropical Lime Ice Cream Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 quart (4 cups) vanilla ice cream, softened
1 tsp Grated lime peel, if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the crust ingredients; mix well.
2. Reserve 3 tablespoons of the crumb mixture for topping. Press the remaining crumb mixture lightly into the bottom of an ungreased 13 x 9 inch pan.
3. Spoon the sherbet into the crust-lined pan and top with pineapple. Spread the ice cream over the pineapple.
4. Top with the reserved crumb mixture and lime peel.
5. Freeze until firm. Let stand at room temperature for about 10 minutes before serving.
6. Garnish as desired. Yield: 12 servings.
